subject: fix(ui): normalize debug pill z-index from 99999 to 80
body:
The inline debug pill in index.html used hardcoded zIndex:'99999' in
three render states (expanded panel, collapsed error pill, collapsed
"0 errors" pill). The CSS z-index scale defines --z-debug: 80 as the
topmost layer. Normalized all three to zIndex:'80' per the glow-props
Z_INDEX_SCALE pattern.

Audit confirmed no other ad-hoc z-index values in the codebase.

Tags: ui, debug, z-index, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: z-index-scale
Semver: patch
